name: Pac-Man (Full-Stack Game)
highlights: Led a team of 5 graduate students to build a full-stack Pac-Man game using Java Spark with MVC architecture.
Designed and implemented REST APIs to connect the front-end UI with backend game logic.
Applied object-oriented design principles to ensure scalability, modularity, and reusability.

name: Chat Application
highlights: Led a team of 5 graduate students to develop a real-time chat application using Java Spark (MVC).
Implemented WebSockets to enable real-time messaging and bidirectional communication.
Designed scalable backend services supporting concurrent users.

name: MNIST Handwritten Digit Classification with SOM
highlights: Explored Self-Organizing Maps (SOM) for handwritten digit classification using the MNIST dataset.
Analyzed SOM performance as an alternative to CNN-based approaches.
Studied biologically inspired learning techniques and their effectiveness on visual datasets.

name: Text Translation in Images
highlights: Built a deep-learning pipeline to extract and translate text from images for non-native English speakers.
Used EasyOCR on ICDAR-2013 dataset for text recognition.
Applied mBART-Large-50 transformer for multilingual text translation using NLP and CV techniques.

name: Hope Simpson COVID-19 Analysis Platform
highlights: Developed and maintained a COVID-19 data analysis and visualization platform using React and GraphQL.
Improved site load performance by 20% through frontend and data-layer optimizations.
Used Google Lighthouse to audit and improve performance and tooling integration.

name: PacMites (AI Search Algorithms – PACWAR)
highlights: Implemented AI agents (‘Pacmites’) with genetic algorithms and hill-climbing search strategies.
Designed gene-based behavior systems and evaluated algorithmic performance.
Built simulations in Python to compare optimization techniques.

name: Buyer–Seller Protocol using Blockchain & Computer Vision
highlights: Designed a blockchain-based buyer-seller protocol with digital watermarking for multimedia tracking.
Implemented a proof-of-concept using Flask and Python.
Used GAN-based watermarking to ensure robustness against attacks while preserving content quality.

name: Vscripts (JavaScript-Based Language)
highlights: Designed a JavaScript-based programming language to explore real-time language execution.
Focused on improving efficiency and reliability of language runtime behavior.

name: Home Automation using Google Assistant
highlights: Built a system to control home appliances using Google Assistant.
Integrated Adafruit IO and IFTTT services for device automation.

name: Stream Data Mining
highlights: Performed opinion mining on social network data streams.
Modeled data using graph-based representations and clustering techniques.

name: Exploring NavIC
highlights: Evaluated accuracy of India’s NavIC GPS module against standard GPS systems.
Analyzed interference sources and measurement errors.

name: Traffic Management System
highlights: Built a prototype traffic management solution during a competitive hackathon.

name: Indicon 2018 Conference Website
highlights: Developed the official website for IEEE Indicon 2018.
Built frontend using HTML, CSS (Bootstrap), and JavaScript.
Implemented backend using PHP (CodeIgniter).
